rulings.Case Title: GREG HERMAN VS. PACIFIC HEIGHTS TOWERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT GREG HERMAN MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. No authority is cited for the proposition that failure to comply with local rules requiring additional service by e-mail (especially, when service by other means is accomplished) deprives the Court of jurisdiction. =(501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT DEBBIE NGOW DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to October 25, 2019 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMY L. HUNT VS. MARCO SALCISSIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT AMY ONG, MARCO SALSICCIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is DENIED. Triable issues of fact re: negotiability of instrument. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS MARSH ET AL VS. RUTH BONILLA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT RUTH BONILLA, LUIS HIDALGO, CRISTINA BONILLA, LUIS HIDALGO, EDGARDO PALACIOS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint (and Notice on which it is based) sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Memorandum has been recorded prior to "rental units" (plural) being withdrawn. Defendants' suggestion to read into the SFRO a requirement that the Memorandum has to be recorded prior to the earliest withdrawal is not supported by authorities or clear language of SFRO. =(501/REQ)
